name: gemini-text-tools
title: Gemini Text Tools
description: Rewrite selected text with Gemini using quick commands for better writing, grammar fixes, tone changes, and custom prompts.
author: frank

commands.name: rewrite-text
commands.title: Rewrite Text
commands.description: Preview rewrite presets for the selected text or clipboard contents

commands.name: custom-rewrite
commands.title: Custom Rewrite
commands.description: Run a custom Gemini prompt against selected text or manually entered text

commands.name: improve-writing
commands.title: Improve Writing
commands.description: Preview an improved rewrite with highlighted additions and deletions

commands.name: fix-spelling-and-grammar
commands.title: Fix Spelling and Grammar
commands.description: Preview a grammar-fixed rewrite with highlighted changes

commands.name: make-shorter
commands.title: Make Shorter
commands.description: Preview a shorter rewrite with highlighted changes

commands.name: make-longer
commands.title: Make Longer
commands.description: Preview a longer rewrite with highlighted changes

commands.name: professional-tone
commands.title: Professional Tone
commands.description: Preview a professional rewrite with highlighted changes

commands.name: friendly-tone
commands.title: Friendly Tone
commands.description: Preview a friendlier rewrite with highlighted changes

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Google AI Studio API key used to call the Gemini Generative Language API.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Gemini model to use for rewrite requests.

preferences.name: source
preferences.title: Preferred Source
preferences.description: Prefer selected text or clipboard when reading input. The other source is used as a fallback.

preferences.name: action
preferences.title: Default Quick Action
preferences.description: Choose whether quick commands paste back into the active app or copy the result.

preferences.name: customInstructions
preferences.title: Additional Instructions
preferences.description: Optional extra guidance appended to every rewrite request, such as style rules or preferred spelling.
preferences.placeholder: Use British spelling, avoid em dashes, ...
